title: Canadian Incidence Study of Reported Child Abuse and Neglect 2008 - Canada.ca
content:
## Canadian Incidence Study of Reported Child Abuse and Neglect 2008

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
This report is dedicated to the children and families who are served by Canadian child welfare workers. It is our sincere hope that the study contributes to ensuring that all children across Canada have full and equal access to the most effective services and supports.
